basic_details.job_title: SFIO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 69 Junior Consultants and Young Professionals Posts
basic_details.short_information: Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) has released the official Junior Consultants and Young Professionals Notification 2026 at sfio.nic.in. A total of 69 vacancies have been announced under the SFIO Junior Consultants and Young Professionals Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between Max: 65 years with a qualification of Law Graduate, Advocate, CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance), PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in relevant fields can apply online from 13 May 2026 to 03 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age of 65 years for retired government employees.
age_limit.details: Maximum age of 65 years for retired government employees with grade pay of Rs.7600 (Pay Matrix-12) and above and with at least 10 years' experience in the required domain.

qualification.education_qualification: Law Graduate, Advocate, CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance), PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in relevant field.
qualification.details: Junior Consultant (Law): Advocate with at least 3-8 years' experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies in the field of Corporate Law. Young Professional (Law): Law Graduate with at least one-year experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies in the field of Corporate Law. Junior Consultant (Financial Analysis): CA/CWA/MBA(Finance) with at least 3-8 years' experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies in the field of Financial Analysis/Forensic Audit. Young Professional (Financial Analysis/Forensic Audit): CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance) with at least one-year experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies. Junior Consultant (General Administration): PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in relevant field/subject with 3-8 years' experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SFIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SFIO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the SFIO Junior Consultants and Young Professionals posts is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SFIO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 69 vacancies are available for the posts of Junior Consultants and Young Professionals in the Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for SFIO posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, including Law Graduate, Advocate, CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance), and PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in a relevant field. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Young Professionals and Junior Consultants?
faq.answer: Young Professionals will receive a salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month, while Junior Consultants will be paid Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for applying to SFIO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 65 years for retired government employees. Other age criteria, if any, should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for SFIO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for SFIO Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online through the official website of SFIO.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Junior Consultants and Young Professionals are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply for more than one field?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who wish to apply for more than one field may submit a separate application for each field.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for SFIO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed via the 'Important Links' section on this page or directly from the SFIO official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for SFIO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection procedure.
